dialogue_text: We must hurry and get back to the road of yellow brick before dark,
source_excerpt: "We must hurry and get back to the road of yellow brick before dark," he said; and the Scarecrow agreed with him. So they kept walking until Dorothy could stand no longer. Her eyes closed in spite of herself and she forgot where she was...
